description:
Visualize the Point Spread Function (PSF) of a star from '~/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits' as a 3D surface. Identify a bright star and crop the image to a rectangular region of interest (between 20x20 and 150x150 pixels) centered on it. Save the cropped image to '~/AstroImages/processed/psf_crop.fits' and a 3D surface plot of the crop to '~/AstroImages/processed/psf_surface.png'. Measure the peak pixel value and its X/Y coordinates within the cropped image, then save the results to '~/AstroImages/processed/psf_stats.txt' using the format:

crop_width: <value>
crop_height: <value>
peak_value: <value>
peak_x: <value>
peak_y: <value>
